Tae Young Ryu.

A middle schooler from Seoul who designs interfaces in Figma and ships them in code. I'm most at home in the space between pixels and systems.

01 — About

A middle schooler between pixels & code.

Hi, I'm Tae Young Ryu — a middle school student in Seoul. On Entry and Figma I go by @ty2035.

I started making tiny games on Entry when I was younger and got hooked on the feeling that something on a screen could move just because I told it to. These days I design in Figma and bring the result to life in code — learning a little more every week.

I believe the best interfaces are the ones that disappear. Accuracy over flair. Rhythm over information. Feel over features.

Stage
Middle school student
Based in
Seoul, Korea
Working with
Entry Figma HTML CSS JavaScript
02 — Selected work

Things I've made on Entry.

See all on Entry ↗
2024
Aurum
A virtual OS featuring fluid animations and a clean UI.
OSEntry
↗
2025
Project Two
An interactive piece that follows your cursor. Part motion study, part toy.
InteractiveMotion
↗
2025
Project Three
A co-op puzzle meant to play with friends. Two players, one shared solution.
PuzzleCo-op
↗
2024
Project Four
A small learning tool built for a classroom — flashcards with spaced repetition.
ToolEducation
↗
2024
Project Five
Something experimental I'm still figuring out. Notes incoming.
WIP
↗

* Each project is a Markdown file in src/content/projects/. To add a new one, just create a new file there with the right frontmatter.
